title: hedyotis schlechtendahliana subsp. cordata
intro: Hedyotis schlechtendahliana subsp. cordata, also known as the Cordate Hedyotis, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and is valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and promoting expectoration of mucus. Hedyotis schlechtendahliana subsp. cordata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
